replies.msg:
https://petitions.whitehouse.gov/petition/petition-calling-suspension-crowd-control-equipment-exports-hong-kong-prevent-human-rights-abuses
Petition calling for the suspension of crowd control equipment exports to Hong Kong, prevent human rights abuses

In recent years, Hong Kong police have purchased more aggressive crowd control equipment from foreign countries. The US is one of the major suppliers for items including pepperball guns, bean bag rounds, rubber rounds and pepper spray. These weapons are repeatedly misused to suppress protestors and even journalists in HK's recent anti-extradition protests, such as shooting protestors' heads, using pepper spray at close range, and unleashing tear gas directly at unarmed protestors. Such violations of human rights should be condemned and sanctioned, otherwise, it would only encourage further abuse of excessive force.

We, therefore, strongly urge the US government to suspend any export application of crowd control equipment to Hong Kong to prevent further brutality against Hong Kongers.

Needs 93,366 signatures by August 4, 2019 to get a response from the White House

https://petitions.whitehouse.gov/petition/petition-calling-suspension-crowd-control-equipment-exports-hong-kong-prevent-human-rights-abuses
Petition calling for the suspension of crowd control equipment exports to Hong Kong, prevent human rights abuses

In recent years, Hong Kong police have purchased more aggressive crowd control equipment from foreign countries. The US is one of the major suppliers for items including pepperball guns, bean bag rounds, rubber rounds and pepper spray. These weapons are repeatedly misused to suppress protestors and even journalists in HK's recent anti-extradition protests, such as shooting protestors' heads, using pepper spray at close range, and unleashing tear gas directly at unarmed protestors. Such violations of human rights should be condemned and sanctioned, otherwise, it would only encourage further abuse of excessive force.

We, therefore, strongly urge the US government to suspend any export application of crowd control equipment to Hong Kong to prevent further brutality against Hong Kongers.

Needs 93,366 signatures by August 4, 2019 to get a response from the White House

Petition calling for the suspension of crowd control equipment exports to Hong Kong, prevent human rights abuses

In recent years, Hong Kong police have purchased more aggressive crowd control equipment from foreign countries. The US is one of the major suppliers for items including pepperball guns, bean bag rounds, rubber rounds and pepper spray. These weapons are repeatedly misused to suppress protestors and even journalists in HK's recent anti-extradition protests, such as shooting protestors' heads, using pepper spray at close range, and unleashing tear gas directly at unarmed protestors. Such violations of human rights should be condemned and sanctioned, otherwise, it would only encourage further abuse of excessive force.

We, therefore, strongly urge the US government to suspend any export application of crowd control equipment to Hong Kong to prevent further brutality against Hong Kongers.

Needs 93,366 signatures by August 4, 2019 to get a response from the White House

光復香港，時代革命！
－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－
想比更多人知道其實而家呢一刻基本上得番香港獨立呢條路，

而家就算有真普選其實都係under中共！！
咁唔通去到2047再抗爭過咩，西方國家都出唔到手幫你地。

可能好多我地呢代既諗點解上一代冇去抗爭！
可能好多下一代係2047係到諗點解我地唔直接爭取獨立！！！

2047到時只會都係變返中國，仲要一下子就變，一定好多人接受唔到。

所有問題去到最後只會追究到主權問題，希望大家思考下。
今次搞到咁大真係最後一次反擊同最大力量。

BTW，五大訴求，缺一不可！

Petition calling for the suspension of crowd control equipment exports to Hong Kong, prevent human rights abuses

In recent years, Hong Kong police have purchased more aggressive crowd control equipment from foreign countries. The US is one of the major suppliers for items including pepperball guns, bean bag rounds, rubber rounds and pepper spray. These weapons are repeatedly misused to suppress protestors and even journalists in HK's recent anti-extradition protests, such as shooting protestors' heads, using pepper spray at close range, and unleashing tear gas directly at unarmed protestors. Such violations of human rights should be condemned and sanctioned, otherwise, it would only encourage further abuse of excessive force.

We, therefore, strongly urge the US government to suspend any export application of crowd control equipment to Hong Kong to prevent further brutality against Hong Kongers.

Needs 93,366 signatures by August 4, 2019 to get a response from the White House

光復香港,時代革命

Petition calling for the suspension of crowd control equipment exports to Hong Kong, prevent human rights abuses

In recent years, Hong Kong police have purchased more aggressive crowd control equipment from foreign countries. The US is one of the major suppliers for items including pepperball guns, bean bag rounds, rubber rounds and pepper spray. These weapons are repeatedly misused to suppress protestors and even journalists in HK's recent anti-extradition protests, such as shooting protestors' heads, using pepper spray at close range, and unleashing tear gas directly at unarmed protestors. Such violations of human rights should be condemned and sanctioned, otherwise, it would only encourage further abuse of excessive force.

We, therefore, strongly urge the US government to suspend any export application of crowd control equipment to Hong Kong to prevent further brutality against Hong Kongers.

Needs 93,366 signatures by August 4, 2019 to get a response from the White House
